params.name: Action Synchronizer
params.description: Precision-engineered for underground mining tragedies! Our patented AI ensures your limbs move in sync... mostly. Whether fighting rocks or your own muscle spasms - at least you'll look coordinated doing it!
params.ss1:

Vanguard Kit gives Extra Daily Drills +3
